target_text: Audio fingerprint confirms live human performance. Not synthetic.
original_output: The audio is human-authored. The presence of a piano and a violin playing a melody suggests a human-composed piece, as AI-generated music typically lacks the nuanced emotional expression and complexity of human compositions.
final_output: Audio fingerprint confirms live human performance. Not synthetic.
